access_mode.description: Specifies the access mode for the resource, such as read-only or read-write.

architecture.description: Defines the CPU architecture to use, such as x86_64 or arm64.

async_primary_disk.description: A list of primary disk configurations, each specifying the disk name.

create_snapshot_before_destroy.description: Indicates whether a snapshot should be created before destroying the resource.

create_snapshot_before_destroy_prefix.description: Prefix to use for naming snapshots created before resource destruction.

description.description: Provides a human-readable description of the resource.

disk_encryption_key.description: Defines the encryption key properties for securing disks, including KMS keys and raw keys.
disk_encryption_key.type: list(object({kms_key_self_link: optional(string),kms_key_service_account: optional(string),raw_key: optional(string),rsa_encrypted_key: optional(string),sha256: optional(string)}))

enable_confidential_compute.description: Enables confidential compute for the resource if set to true.

guest_os_features.description: List of features to enable for the guest operating system, such as UEFI or secure boot.

image.description: Specifies the image to use for creating the resource, such as a VM image.

labels.description: Key-value pairs used to organize and categorize the resource.

licenses.description: List of licenses associated with the resource.

name.description: Required name of the resource, which must be unique within its scope.

params.description: Additional parameters for the resource, including optional resource manager tags.

physical_block_size_bytes.description: Specifies the block size in bytes for the physical storage, such as 4096.

provisioned_iops.description: Defines the number of IOPS provisioned for the resource, if applicable.

provisioned_throughput.description: Sets the provisioned throughput for the resource, measured in MB/s.

size.description: Specifies the size of the resource, such as disk size in GB.

snapshot.description: Reference to a snapshot used to create the resource.

source_disk.description: Specifies the source disk to use when creating the resource.

source_image_encryption_key.description: Encryption key details for the source image, including KMS or raw key options.

source_instant_snapshot.description: Specifies the instant snapshot to use as the source for creating the resource.

source_snapshot_encryption_key.description: Encryption key details for the source snapshot, including KMS or raw key options.

source_storage_object.description: Defines the source storage object to use when creating the resource.

storage_pool.description: Specifies the storage pool where the resource should be allocated.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout values for create, update, or delete operations.

type.description: Specifies the resource type, such as standard or premium.

zone.description: Defines the zone where the resource should be created or located.
